name: final-release-review
description: Perform a release-readiness review by locating the previous release tag from remote tags and auditing the diff (e.g., v1.2.3...<commit>) for breaking changes, regressions, improvement opportunities...
intent_triggers: use the final release review agent skill
run a workflow for final release review
help me with final release review
我需要處理 final release review 相關工作
幫我啟用 final release review 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 final release review
use final release review from openai-agents-js
